notes: FROZEN (daemon=incapable): antigravity has no RateLimitSnapshot surface — no statusline/hook channel (unlike claudecode) and no MetricsReader. Quota burndown (Windows[].UsedPercent, SampledAt) leaves no trace in the tailed transcript JSONL; cumulative consumption lives only in the SQLite protobuf store. No burndown assertion can reach events.jsonl. Unblock: a hook or MetricsReader exposing a per-account quota window.
